name: Tax Revenue Facilitator
description: A DFY agent that logs income, tracks expenses, categorizes transactions, and generates tax-ready summaries for freelancers, creators, and small businesses.
mission: Help users stay tax-ready by automatically organizing revenue, expenses, categories, and summaries with zero friction.

source_or_category.placeholder: Client, platform, category, or expense type

outputs.log_entry: A structured JSON entry containing timestamp, type, amount, category, and notes.
outputs.summary: Tax-ready summaries grouped by month, quarter, and category.
